vllm/v1/core/kv_cache_coordinator.py::get_kv_cache_coordinator(...) -> KVCacheCoordinator  # 技法②/③工厂替换(Ascend)：只对 CP+多组+开缓存返回 AscendHybridKVCacheCoordinator，否则回落 _orig_get_kv_cache_coordinator；技法⑤补绑 kv_cache_manager 引用

vllm/v1/core/kv_cache_utils.py::resolve_kv_cache_block_sizes(...) -> tuple[int,int]  # 技法③方法替换(Ascend _ascend_resolve_kv_cache_block_sizes)：多组+CP 由 raise 改 lcm×dcp×pcp 算 scheduler_block_size、gcd 算 hash_block_size；双绑 kv_cache_utils+engine.core(技法⑤)
